languages.text: "...рядовой воин, что принес с собой в усыпальницу проклятье Лланду'гора. Погрузившись в Долгий Сон, Фарах тем самым стал источником гибели для всей гробницы, превратив ее обитателей в безумцев, жаждущих плоти".

traits.locale_text: "Фарах, рядовой воин, что принес с собой в усыпальницу проклятье Лланду'гора. Погрузившись в Долгий Сон, он тем самым стал источником гибели для всей гробницы, превратив ее обитателей в безумцев, жаждущих плоти".

languages.text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."
languages.original_text: "...рядовой воин, что принес с собой в усыпальницу проклятье Лланду'гора. Погрузившись в Долгий Сон, Фарах тем самым стал источником гибели для всей гробницы, превратив ее обитателей в безумцев, жаждущих плоти".

traits.locale_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

"Pharakh, an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, he thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry lunatics."

"Pharakh, an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, he thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry lunatics."

"...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

languages.text: “……一个将兰杜戈尔的诅咒带进墓穴的普通战士。法拉克就此陷入了大休眠，成了整座墓穴的厄运之源，把所有住民都变成了渴望血肉的堕落怪物。”
languages.original_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

traits.locale_text: “……一个将兰杜戈尔的诅咒带进墓穴的普通战士。法拉克就此陷入了大休眠，成了整座墓穴的厄运之源，把所有住民都变成了渴望血肉的堕落怪物。”

languages.text: «... un guerrero común que trajo la maldición de Llandu'gor a la tumba. Al sumirse en el Gran Letargo, Pharakh fue causante de la condena de toda la tumba, convirtiendo a sus habitantes en degenerados hambrientos de carne».
languages.original_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

traits.locale_text: «... un guerrero común que trajo la maldición de Llandu'gor a la tumba. Al sumirse en el Gran Letargo, Pharakh fue causante de la condena de toda la tumba, convirtiendo a sus habitantes en degenerados hambrientos de carne».

languages.text: « ... guerrier ordinaire qui emporta la malédiction de Llandu'gor dans la tombe. Victime du Long Sommeil, Pharakh contamina ainsi la tombe tout entière, transformant ses habitants en dégénérés affamés de chair fraîche. »
languages.original_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

traits.locale_text: « ... guerrier ordinaire qui emporta la malédiction de Llandu'gor dans la tombe. Victime du Long Sommeil, Pharakh contamina ainsi la tombe tout entière, transformant ses habitants en dégénérés affamés de chair fraîche. »

languages.text: "Llandu'gor'un lanetini mezara getiren sıradan bir savaşçı. Pharakh, Ulu Uyku'ya dalarak tüm mezarın kıyamet kaynağı oldu ve sakinlerini ete aç soysuzlarla dönüştürdü."
languages.original_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

traits.locale_text: "Llandu'gor'un lanetini mezara getiren sıradan bir savaşçı. Pharakh, Ulu Uyku'ya dalarak tüm mezarın kıyamet kaynağı oldu ve sakinlerini ete aç soysuzlarla dönüştürdü."

languages.text: "... ein einfacher Krieger, der den Fluch von Llandu'gor in die Gruft einschleppte. Als er in den Großen Schlaf fiel, besiegelte Pharakh das Verderben des gesamten Grabes und verwandelte seine Bewohner in Fleisch fressende Degeneraten."
languages.original_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

traits.locale_text: "... ein einfacher Krieger, der den Fluch von Llandu'gor in die Gruft einschleppte. Als er in den Großen Schlaf fiel, besiegelte Pharakh das Verderben des gesamten Grabes und verwandelte seine Bewohner in Fleisch fressende Degeneraten."

languages.text: 「…普通の人間である戦士が、墓に連れてきたランドゥゴールの呪い。そして、大眠りに落ちたファラハは、墓全体を滅ぼす存在となり、その住人たちは肉食の堕落者へと変貌した」
languages.original_text: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."

traits.locale_text: 「…普通の人間である戦士が、墓に連れてきたランドゥゴールの呪い。そして、大眠りに落ちたファラハは、墓全体を滅ぼす存在となり、その住人たちは肉食の堕落者へと変貌した」
